raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX, XXXX, I placed an item order on XXXX. I did not receive the item, no matter what Citi and XXXX are saying. XXXX refused refund after multiple attempts to contact, so I opened a dispute case, provided the evidence of whole open box video to show that I did NOT receive the said item. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Citi rejected my dispute under the claim that the item which I returned was not the item shipped to me. I did not receive the item, how do I return the item? It is absurd and extortionary. Plus they did NOT provide evidence to back up their claim, no CCTV footage, no nothing, while I have solid evidence to back up my claim. 

Now they are claiming that I did not send back a request within the timeline. I did, via their dispute email, they are lying about this. I did, and they did not process my request. This is simply unacceptable. 

Please issue penalties according to policy to Citi. It is full violation of Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) 15 U.S. Code 1666, Regulation Z ( 12 CFR 1026 ) Implements the Truth in Lending Act ( TILA ), Unfair, Deceptive, or Abusive Acts or Practices ( UDAAP ) Dodd-Frank Act, 12 U.S.C. 5531.
